description_long: This object is a vintage-style candle set in an ornate metal candlestick holder. The candle itself is a short, cylindrical pillar of off-white wax, with a visible wick and a small, flickering flame at the top. The holder is crafted from tarnished, darkened metal, featuring a wide, stable base with a stepped design and a decorative, turned stem. A circular drip tray surrounds the candle, and a curved handle with a thumb rest extends from one side, allowing for easy carrying. The surface of the metal is mottled and aged, giving it an antique appearance. Subtle wax drips are visible on the candle, adding to its realistic, used look.
description: A short, off-white candle with a visible flame sits in an ornate, aged metal candlestick holder with a curved handle and wide base. The holder's surface is tarnished and textured, and wax drips are visible on the candle.
description_view_0: The candle and holder are seen from an angle highlighting the curved handle and thumb rest on the right side, with the candle's flame and wax drips clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the candlestick from the front, with the handle mostly hidden and the stepped base and central stem prominently displayed.
description_view_2: The handle is fully visible on the left, curving outward, and the candle's flame and wax drips are also apparent.
description_view_3: The back of the candlestick is shown, with the handle not visible and the base and stem's symmetry emphasized.
